categories.title: Shrikhand
categories.blurb: Thick, hung curd finished in small batches — saffron, cardamom, and dry fruit notes in every spoon.

items.name: Kesar Ilaichi
items.description: Saffron threads and green cardamom folded into silken shrikhand — celebratory and aromatic.

items.name: Kaju Badam
items.description: Crunch of cashew and almond with a mellow sweetness — made to share at the table.

categories.title: Achaar
categories.blurb: Sun‑matured pickles with bold masala and homestyle care — the taste of Telhara in every jar.

items.name: Aam ka Achar
items.description: Classic raw mango pickle with a sharp, tangy heat — a monsoon memory, year round.

items.name: Laswe ka Achar
items.description: Whole laswa (gunda) berries in a bold, slow-cured masala — regional character in every bite.

items.name: Kair ka Achar
items.description: Whole desert kair berries in a bold masala — robust, earthy, and perfect with everyday meals.

categories.title: Chai Masala
categories.blurb: Whole spices roasted and stone‑ground for daily chai — cardamom, clove, ginger notes in balance. Separate from our aamchur line.

items.name: Chai Masala
items.description: Our signature tea blend: warming spices, measured heat — one pinch per cup for kadak or mild chai.

categories.title: Aamchur
categories.blurb: Dry mango powder — tangy, fruity acidity for chaat, gravies, chutneys, and marinades. Not mixed into chai masala; sold as its own pack.

items.name: Aamchur
items.description: Sun‑dried raw mango, finely ground — adds sour brightness without vinegar. Ideal for raita, dal, and street‑style chaat.
